TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Nicolas_Batum, title = Nicolas_Batum, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nicolas_Batum} }

S.FORM: Nicolas Batum hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw / praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1988, ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 12, Nicolas Batum, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Nicolas Batum hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw / praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1988, ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 12, Nicolas Batum, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: niʦ~ʨolas~ɕ βatum ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pʔaɣal tins~ɕʔ taj s~ɕuruw / praw makiʔ tajɣlaiŋ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, niʦ~ʨolas~ɕ βatum, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
